basic_details.job_title: BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) Notification 2026 has been released on 17 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced through the BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) Recruitment 2026 for Electronics, Mechanical, and Electrical disciplines.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 50 years as on 01-06-2026. Age Relaxation: OBC-NCL: 53 Years, SC/ST: 55 Years, PwBD as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Engineering or equivalent in Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Electronics and Telecommunication/Communication/Telecommunication, Diploma in Electrical Engineering or equivalent, Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent
qualification.details: Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) - Electronics: Diploma in Engineering or equivalent in Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Electronics and Telecommunication/Communication/Telecommunication. Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) - Mechanical: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent. Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) - Electrical: Diploma in Electrical Engineering or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BEL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.bharat_electronics_bel: Diploma in Engineering or equivalent in Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Electronics and Telecommunication/Communication/Telecommunication, Diploma in Electrical Engineering or equivalent, Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent

content_sections.heading: BEL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BEL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BEL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer Vacancy Details 2026
BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) - Electronics: Diploma in Engineering or equivalent in Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Electronics and Telecommunication/Communication/Telecommunication. Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) - Mechanical: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent. Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) - Electrical: Diploma in Electrical Engineering or equivalent.

content_sections.heading: BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 50 years as on 01-06-2026. Age Relaxation: OBC-NCL: 53 Years, SC/ST: 55 Years, PwBD as per Govt. of India Rules.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BEL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.bel-india.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) posts at Bharat Electronics is 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by BEL?
faq.answer: Bharat Electronics has announced a total of 17 vacancies for the Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) positions across various disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to possess a Diploma in Engineering or equivalent in Electronics, Electrical, or Mechanical disciplines to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying is 50 years as of 01 June 2026, with age relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Asst. Engineer (E-I) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer positions?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which city and state are these BEL vacancies located in?
faq.answer: The vacancies are located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this BEL recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 4788/002/REC/HR&A/CHN/2026.
